title: AIF 2026 | AI Festival
text:
Presenting Partners
AIF 2026
info
Welcome to Runway’s fourth annual AI Festival. Originally established in 2022 with a focus on AI films, AIF has evolved into an interdisciplinary celebration of creatives experimenting at the forefront of art and technology. In Film, Design, New Media, Fashion, Advertising and Gaming.
Works showcased offer a glimpse at a new creative era. One made possible when today’s brightest creative minds are empowered with the tools of tomorrow.
Finalists of the various AIF tracks will be selected and showcased both virtually as well at gala screenings in NYC and LA. Winning submissions will be chosen by an esteemed panel of jurors and shown at partner festivals around the world.
Finalists
2026
Between Before and After
Sifang Chen & Yang Wang
8:21
Kyoko sees a billboard of ex-lover Nagao and meets her again. Bound by a shared void rather than love, they circle a desire that never satisfies. As Nagao proposes a final plunge, reality intrudes, leaving a rupture where past and future become indistinguishable.
Costa Verde
Léo Cannone & New Forest Film
11:35
Set in Corsica in the 90s, a young boy unboxes his first camera and documents a summer with his grandparents. What begins as play becomes a chronicle of small wonders and everyday magic. Costa Verde celebrates childhood nostalgia and family.
살(煞) - Divine Retribution
Minju Choi
7:39
In a Joseon-era village, the birth of a strange being unfolds a haunting story of a mother, a shaman and the villagers caught between fear and faith.
A Face Only A Mother Could Love
Robert Gaudette
7:50
Marcel Dupont, a man whose face only a mother could love, moves through Paris with complete confidence. The world moves away from him - he does not notice. This is a film about two lonely people, one act of courage and an accordion player who played exactly the right song at exactly the right moment.
Little Mes
Lucas Levitan & Fabián Jiménez
4:19
Who would you have become if you had taken a different path? Little Mes is an internal monologue built around that question, a constant unresolved doubt that follows a character through life.
POSTMAN
YUUUKI
7:00
A short animation set in a near future where the culture of letters has vanished. In a world of efficiency, a protagonist finds an old letter and embarks on a journey to deliver it, rediscovering forgotten emotions that efficiency cannot measure.
Simiyu, Lies and Happiness
John Kirk Kelly
3:34
A quiet portrait of the thoughts and moments that shape the lives of guests and workers connected to an inn in Australia around the early 1980s.
TAIRELL ISN'T REAL
Dave Clark
5:04
A hyper-perfect influencer begins to unravel when the internet becomes convinced he isn't real, forcing him to confront a terrifying possibility: they might be right.
THE WELL
Dorian & Daniel
5:29
Once upon a time, in a snow-covered trailer park, the wolf is found dead at the bottom of a well. A tragic accident - or so they say. But when a sharp-witted hare starts to investigate, the truth shifts. What secrets lie buried below?
Where Knights Fall
Mathery
3:35
In a tower at the edge of a far away kingdom, Rapunzel waits. At the foot of the tower, the ground is thick with the bodies of knights, princesses and princes, all those who came before, all those who tried and fell. Then he arrives. He doesn't climb, but he crawls and slides.
